title: pterigeron decurrens
intro: Pterigeron decurrens, also known as the running bedstraw or running bedstraw, is a perennial herb in the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pterigeron decurrens include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Pterigeron decurrens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
